ecarx.carext.vehicle.module

Interface IPAS


  • public interface IPAS
    function definitions for PAS, PAC, SAP, RTCA | PAS : Parking Assist System | PAC : Park Assist Camera
    | SAP : Semi Automatic Parking | RCTA : Rear Collision Traffic Alert

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static interface  IPAS.Functions 
      static interface  IPAS.RCTAWarningVolumeMode 

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int DLC_AUTHORIZED_TIME
      DCL Data Collect Authorized Time，original ID PAS_FUNC_DCLAT_AUTHORIZED_TIME DLC车辆数据采集授权时间，原 ID 为 PAS_FUNC_DCLAT_AUTHORIZED_TIME ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Long property type 具体值由业务约定 mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 14:17:41
      static int DLC_SWITCH
      DLC Vehicle Data Collect Function Switch，original ID PAS_FUNC_DCL_SWITCH DLC车辆数据采集开关，原 ID 为 PAS_FUNC_DCL_SWITCH（属于ADAS功能需求） ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 14:11:14
      static int HPA_CAR_CONFIG_HMI_CAR_STATE
      HMI displays vehicle status, original ID is PAS_FUNC_HPA_CAR_CONFIG_HMI_CAR_STATE HMI显示车辆状态，原 ID 为PAS_FUNC_HPA_CAR_CONFIG_HMI_CAR_STATE ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer[] property type 状态数组，每个下标代表一个类别的状态，不同项目下标代表含义不尽相同，使用前需自行确认。0 表示无效。 mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project hongqi at 2024-07-17 15:27:35
      static int PEB_SWITCH
      Parking emergency brake switch 泊车紧急制动开关 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-25 16:06:53
      static int RCTA_WARNING_VOLUME
      Allows the user to adjust the volume level of the Rear Collision Traffic Alert(RCTA) warning sound RCTA(倒车预警系统)警报音等级设置 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IPAS.RCTAWarningVolumeMode property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-25 16:04:53

    • Field Detail

      • RCTA_WARNING_VOLUME

        static final int RCTA_WARNING_VOLUME
        Allows the user to adjust the volume level of the Rear Collision Traffic Alert(RCTA) warning sound RCTA(倒车预警系统)警报音等级设置
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • IPAS.RCTAWarningVolumeMode property type
        deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-25 16:04:53

        Constant Field Values

      • HPA_CAR_CONFIG_HMI_CAR_STATE

        static final int HPA_CAR_CONFIG_HMI_CAR_STATE
        HMI displays vehicle status, original ID is PAS_FUNC_HPA_CAR_CONFIG_HMI_CAR_STATE HMI显示车辆状态，原 ID 为PAS_FUNC_HPA_CAR_CONFIG_HMI_CAR_STATE
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • Integer[] property type 状态数组，每个下标代表一个类别的状态，不同项目下标代表含义不尽相同，使用前需自行确认。0 表示无效。
        mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project hongqi at 2024-07-17 15:27:35
